change_log.change: Added struct TrickRecord with fields (cards, player_ids, winner, num_played); Added macro MAX_TRICKS_PER_ROUND=13; Added fields to RenderState (chat_trick_num, chat_hover_trick_num, chat_hover_trick_rect, trick_history, trick_history_count, trick_tooltip); Added function render_chat_log_push_trick()

src/game/phase_transitions.c
src/main.c

change_log.change: (1) phase2_state.h: Added Card last_played_transmuted_card field to Phase2State struct for tracking the card that carried the last transmutation (Mirror history). (2) transmutation_logic.h: Changed transmute_trick_count_points() signature from (const Trick*, const TrickTransmuteInfo*) to (const Trick*, const TrickTransmuteInfo*, const Phase2State*) to access p2->last_played_transmuted_card for Mirror effect point calculation. (3) protocol.h: Added uint8_t last_played_transmuted_card_suit and uint8_t last_played_transmuted_card_rank fields to NetPlayerView struct for wire serialization of the Card.
impact: src/server/server_game.c (line 1181: transmute_trick_count_points() call updated with p2 parameter; lines 1789, 1926: stores last_played_transmuted_card)

src/net/protocol.c (lines 1571-1572, 1736-1737, 2358-2361: serializes/deserializes new NetPlayerView fields; line 2358-2361: reconstructs last_played_transmuted_card from suit/rank in net_build_player_view)
src/net/state_recv.c (lines 292-295: reconstructs last_played_transmuted_card from received suit/rank fields)
src/game/play_phase.c (line 155: stores last_played_transmuted_card during transmutation effect resolution)
src/phase2/contract_logic.c (line 77: initializes last_played_transmuted_card to {0,0} in phase2_init)
src/phase2/transmutation_logic.c (line 402: implements updated transmute_trick_count_points() signature; line 427: reads p2->last_played_transmuted_card for Mirror point calculation)

change_log.change: Added int hint_idx parameter to play_card_with_transmute() in play_phase.h and sv_play_card_with_transmute() in server_game.c. This parameter tracks the card inventory index for transmutation hint tracking.
impact: src/game/update.c (line 214-216: already updated to pass cmd.card.card_index)
src/server/server_game.c (lines 536, 1059, 1752: all call sites updated with hint_idx values)

change_log.change: Step 26: Competitive AI and AI difficulty configuration. (1) NEW: ai_competitive.h/c with CompetitiveAIState, QSStatus enum, AIWeights/AIThresholds structs, 10 decision functions (comp_ai_*). (2) server_game.h: Added comp_ai[NUM_PLAYERS] array and ai_difficulty (uint8_t) field to ServerGame. (3) room.h: Added ai_difficulty (uint8_t) field to Room. (4) protocol.h: Added NetMsgStartGame struct (ai_difficulty) and start_game union member to NetMsg. (5) client_net.h: Changed client_net_send_start_game() signature to accept int ai_difficulty parameter.

src/main.c (calls client_net_send_start_game() with difficulty from UI selection)

change_log.change: Removed client-side AI speed configuration. (1) settings.h: Removed enum AISpeed (SLOW/NORMAL/FAST), removed ai_speed field from GameSettings struct, removed settings_ai_think_time() and settings_ai_speed_name() declarations. (2) server_game.h: Added ai_play_delay (float) and ai_play_timer (float) fields to ServerGame struct for server-side per-AI random card play delays (1-3s per turn). (3) render.h: Changed SETTINGS_ROW_COUNT from 9→8 and SETTINGS_ACTIVE_COUNT from 9→8 to reflect removal of AI speed settings row. Impact: Settings menu no longer shows AI speed option; server now manages AI timing independently.
impact: src/core/settings.c (removed AISpeed initialization and save/load)
